use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF PATIENTS WITH METASTATIC COLORECTAL CANCER WHO HAVE BEEN PREVIOUSLY TREATED WITH FLUOROPYRIMIDINE-, OXALIPLATIN-, AND IRINOTECAN-BASED CHEMOTHERAPY, ANTI-VEGF THERAPY, AND, IF RAS WILD-TYPE AND MEDICALLY APPROPRIATE, ANTI-EGFR THERAPY

indications.text:
FRUZAQLA is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with metastatic colorectal cancer (mCRC)
who have been previously treated with fluoropyrimidine-, oxaliplatin-, and irinotecan-based
chemotherapy, an anti-VEGF therapy, and, if RAS wild-type and medically appropriate, an
anti-EGFR therapy.

FRUZAQLA is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with metastatic colorectal cancer (mCRC)
who have been previously treated with fluoropyrimidine , oxaliplatin , and irinotecan based
chemotherapy, an anti VEGF therapy, and, if RAS wild type and medically appropriate, an anti-EGFR
therapy. ‑ ...
